meanings.definition: intensely or extremely bad or unpleasant in degree or quality
examples: under wicked fire from the enemy's guns
a hard left to the chin

meanings.definition: unsparing and uncompromising in discipline or judgment; - H.G.Wells
examples: a parent severe to the pitch of hostility
a hefty six-footer with a rather severe mien

meanings.definition: causing fear or anxiety by threatening great harm
very bad in degree or extent
